summary: Iteration 102 - Guarantee Finalization Fix: All 9 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. The fix allows participants with status 'accepted_pending_guarantee' to finalize their guarantee or decline from the appointment detail page. Backend correctly excludes 'accepted_pending_guarantee' from blocked statuses in all 3 places (respond_to_invitation, accept_with_account, login_and_accept). Frontend correctly shows ParticipantGuaranteeBanner with 'Finaliser ma garantie' and 'Refuser' buttons.

backend_pytest: ✅ A. GET invitation details works for accepted_pending_guarantee token
✅ B. POST respond with action='accept' returns checkout_url for accepted_pending_guarantee (not blocked with 400)
✅ C. POST respond with action='decline' works for accepted_pending_guarantee (sets status to 'declined')
✅ D. Blocked statuses ('accepted', 'accepted_guaranteed', 'declined') still correctly blocked
✅ F. GET appointment detail returns viewer_role='participant' and viewer_participant_status
✅ G. invitations.py respond_to_invitation (line 297) correctly excludes accepted_pending_guarantee
✅ H. invitations.py accept_with_account (line 509) correctly excludes accepted_pending_guarantee
✅ I. invitations.py login_and_accept (line 634) correctly excludes accepted_pending_guarantee
frontend_playwright: ✅ Navigate to appointment detail page works
✅ Banner shows correct text: 'Votre garantie n'est pas encore finalisée'
✅ Participant check-in block (data-testid='participant-checkin-block') present with 'Confirmer ma présence' button
✅ Participant status shows 'Garantie en cours' in participants list

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend (invitations.py line 297): respond_to_invitation correctly checks 'if current_status in ['accepted', 'accepted_guaranteed', 'declined']' - excludes accepted_pending_guarantee
✅ Backend (invitations.py line 509): accept_with_account correctly checks 'if participant.get('status') in ['accepted', 'accepted_guaranteed', 'declined']' - excludes accepted_pending_guarantee
✅ Backend (invitations.py line 634): login_and_accept correctly checks 'if participant.get('status') in ['accepted', 'accepted_guaranteed', 'declined']' - excludes accepted_pending_guarantee
✅ Frontend (AppointmentDetail.js lines 79-145): ParticipantGuaranteeBanner component correctly implemented with handleFinalize and handleDecline functions

✅ Frontend (AppointmentDetail.js lines 663-668): Conditional render correctly shows ParticipantGuaranteeBanner when !isOrganizer && viewerParticipantStatus === 'accepted_pending_guarantee' && !isCancelled
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guarantee Finalization Fix fully tested. Key verified behaviors: (1) Backend allows accepted_pending_guarantee status to retry accept (returns Stripe checkout_url) or decline, (2) Backend still blocks 'accepted', 'accepted_guaranteed', 'declined' statuses from responding, (3) Frontend shows amber ParticipantGuaranteeBanner with 'Finaliser ma garantie' and 'Refuser' buttons when viewer is participant with accepted_pending_guarantee status, (4) Banner does NOT show for organizers (conditional render checks !isOrganizer), (5) ParticipantActionBanner shows for 'invited' status instead.
